content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 323-0886

March 26, 2012


Ronald R. Ball
1200 Carlsbad Village Drive
Carlsbad CA 92008-1949

Re:   Your Request for Advice
      Our file No. W-12-040

Dear Mr. Ball:

      This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission has withdrawn your request for advice dated February 29, 2012, on behalf of Mayer Matt Hall, under the provisions of the Political Reform Act¹ as we discussed in a telephone conversation on March 19, 2012. Consequently, no response will be prepared, and your request is withdrawn.

      If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

                                                Sincerely,

                                                Zackery P. Morazzini
                                                General Counsel

                                    By:   Brian G. Lau
                                          Counsel, Legal Division

BGL:jgl


¹ The Political Reform Act is contained in Government Code Sections 81000 through 91014. All statutory references are to the Government Code, unless otherwise indicated. The regulations of the Fair Political Practices Commission are contained in Sections 18110 through 18997 of Title 2 of the California Code of Regulations. All regulatory references are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations, unless otherwise indicated.

sections.question_synthetic: Not applicable - this is a withdrawal of a prior advice request, not a new legal question.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Withdrawal letter confirming withdrawal of prior request for advice. No Question or Conclusion sections present. Document signed by Brian G. Lau on behalf of General Counsel Zackery P. Morazzini. File number W-12-040.

embedding.summary: The FPPC confirms withdrawal of an advice request dated February 29, 2012, filed by Ronald R. Ball on behalf of Mayer Matt Hall, following a telephone conversation on March 19, 2012. No response to the original request will be prepared.
